goal: Audit ROADMAP.xml canonical status. Either formalize it as source-of-truth for phases, or migrate phase definitions to .planning/phases/<id>/KICKOFF.md and have graph-extractor source from there. Operator had noted uncertainty about this file's role. Decision 2026-04-20 D5 follow-up.
resolution: Shipped in M4 sweep 2026-04-20. See .planning/notes/2026-04-20-multi-agent-architecture-decisions.md and .planning/notes/2026-04-20-roadmap-requirements-audit.md.
